textPlain: Could you post a screen shot of the comments view?
Why it is always: minimal, lightweight, singlefile etc...I want to see full-featured for a change!
There is no published version on the AppStore yet, right? Gotta bookmark that so I can build it later - looks nice!
Why?I don't wear an Apple watch but I do wear a smartwatch, and I can't imagine a reason to want this website on it.
can i read or save it for later so that i can read the full version?
Created the app yesterday, adding more features and will publish hopefully soon.
I suspect this is a "because I can" project ;-)
Its not website its feed browser and comments reader with optional article browser view. Its something I wanted from first day I got apple watch.

So you can read Hacker News on your watch.I find myself doing this randomly when I don’t have access to my phone (believe it or not, it happens for legit reasons) through something called ųBrowser.It’s probably masochistic but it works in a pinch. I’ve been thinking of writing my own watch app to do this, as well as an app that could use the Feedbin API.
Yes you can bookmark articles and they are available is saved articles for later.
